application.description: Create a pip-native Python application (pyproject.toml + project.json with lint/test/build targets).

library.description: Create a publishable pip-native Python library (adds a twine nx-release-publish target + a versionActions override).

internal-library.description: Create a private, never-published Python library (lint/test only).

function-application.description: Create a Python Azure Function app (v2 programming model), deployed as source, not a wheel.
